receiptscanner-sidebar-heading: Heading of the ReceiptScanner sidebar section (its key doubles as the section id in SidebarBeforeOutput).
receiptscanner-sidebar-new-expense: Sidebar toolbox link to Special:FormEdit/Expense (create a new expense entry).
receiptscanner-sidebar-new-income: Sidebar toolbox link to Special:FormEdit/Income (create a new income entry).
receiptscanner-kind-expense: Label for the Expense kind (a payment going out).
receiptscanner-kind-income: Label for the Income kind (a payment coming in).
receiptscanner-upload-intro: Instructional text shown above the upload form on Special:UploadReceipt.
receiptscanner-upload-kind-legend: Legend on the Expense/Income radio group on the upload form.
receiptscanner-upload-choose: Label on the file-picker button on the upload form.
receiptscanner-upload-submit: Label for the submit button on the upload form.
receiptscanner-upload-nofile: Error shown when the upload form is submitted with no file.
receiptscanner-upload-rejected: Error shown when the upload is rejected. $1 is the numeric UploadBase status code; $2 is the file name.
receiptscanner-upload-forbidden: Error shown when the user lacks permission to upload over an existing file. $1 is the file name.
receiptscanner-upload-name-collision: Error shown when a file with the same name but different content already exists. $1 is the file name.
receiptscanner-upload-truncated: Error shown on Special:UploadReceipt when PHP's upload limit dropped the whole request (zero files reached the server). $1 is the count the browser submitted.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-queued: Success banner on Special:ReceiptReview after a clean bulk upload. $1 is the count of files queued.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-queued-mixed: Success banner when the bulk upload mixed new files with already-uploaded ones. $1 = new uploads, $2 = existing files re-queued, $3 = existing files already in the queue.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-queued-dupli: Success banner when the bulk upload was entirely already-uploaded files (no new content). $1 = re-queued, $2 = already in the queue.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-intra-batch-: Trailing sentence appended to the upload flash banner when one or more selected files were byte-identical duplicates of another file in the same selection (the user picked the same content twice under different filenames). $1 is the count of intra-batch duplicates.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-already-revi: Trailing sentence appended to the upload flash banner when one or more re-uploaded files were skipped because they had already been reviewed and saved to a receipt page (so they were not re-queued). $1 is the count of skipped already-saved files.
Upload flash banner on Special:ReceiptReview when every selected file had already been reviewed and saved, so nothing was queued. $1 is the count of already-saved receipts.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-truncated: Warning banner on Special:ReceiptReview after a partially-truncated bulk upload. $1 = received count, $2 = selected count, $3 = dropped count.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-itemerrors: Heading above a list of per-file rejection messages on the post-upload flash banner.
receiptscanner-upload-flash-renamed: Heading above a list of files whose embedded dots were sanitised to underscores during upload (e.g. "Name.com.pdf" → "Name_com.pdf") so MediaWiki's prohibited-extension validator wouldn't reject them. $1 is the count.
receiptscanner-upload-comment: Edit summary recorded on the File page when a receipt is uploaded. Shown in content language.
receiptscanner-review-section-ready: Heading for the Ready section. $1 is the count of entries.
receiptscanner-review-section-processing: Heading for the Processing section. $1 is the count of entries.
receiptscanner-review-section-pending: Heading for the Pending section. $1 is the count of entries.
receiptscanner-review-section-failed: Heading for the Failed section. $1 is the count of entries.
receiptscanner-review-empty: Shown in a section that has no entries.
receiptscanner-review-col-file: Table column header: the uploaded file name.
receiptscanner-review-col-enqueued: Table column header: when the entry was enqueued.
receiptscanner-review-col-action: Table column header: per-row action button or error message.
receiptscanner-review-retry: Label for the button that re-enqueues a failed entry.
receiptscanner-review-renamed-item: One entry in the renamed-files list on Special:UploadReceipt. $1 is the original file name, $2 the sanitized name.
receiptscanner-review-open-form: Label for the link on a Ready row that opens Special:FormEdit/Expense or /Income with parsed values URL-prefilled.
receiptscanner-review-dismiss: Label for the button on a Ready row that drops it from the queue without creating a Receipt page (the entry isn't a real receipt or has been handled elsewhere).
receiptscanner-review-reprocess: Label for the button on a Ready row that creates a new pending queue row for the same file and pushes a fresh ReceiptScanJob (useful after the sidecar engine is updated).
receiptscanner-review-timed-out: Notice shown in the action cell of a Processing row that has been stuck too long (its runner presumably died). Accompanies a Reprocess button.
receiptscanner-review-toggle-type: Row-level button on a Ready row (sits with Review / Reprocess / Dismiss). Click flips the kind (Expense ↔ Income) and reprocesses the row.
receiptscanner-review-no-fields: Inline message on a Ready row whose sidecar response contained no extracted fields.
receiptscanner-unlinked-intro: Intro line on Special:UnlinkedFiles; $1 is the count of files not yet attached to any Expense or Income entry.
receiptscanner-unlinked-empty: Empty-state line on Special:UnlinkedFiles when every uploaded file is already referenced by an Expense or Income page. Rendered as wikitext italics.
receiptscanner-unlinked-process-expense: Button label on an unlinked-file row: enqueue this file as an expense.
receiptscanner-unlinked-process-income: Button label on an unlinked-file row: enqueue this file as income.
receiptscanner-unlinked-delete: Button label on an unlinked-file row: delete the file from the wiki. Shown only to users with the delete right.
receiptscanner-ledger-range-all: Range preset option on Special:Ledger meaning all time.
receiptscanner-ledger-range-custom: Range preset option on Special:Ledger that exposes the From/To date inputs.
receiptscanner-ledger-kind-both: Kind filter option on Special:Ledger: show both expenses and income.
receiptscanner-ledger-kind-expense-only: Kind filter option on Special:Ledger: only expense entries.
receiptscanner-ledger-kind-income-only: Kind filter option on Special:Ledger: only income entries.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-kind: Label for the kind dropdown in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-range: Label for the range dropdown in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-from: Label for the From date input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-to: Label for the To date input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-min: Label for the minimum-amount input. $1 is the system currency code (e.g. USD).
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-max: Label for the maximum-amount input. $1 is the system currency code.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-category: Label for the category prefix input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-category-pl: Placeholder text inside the category input.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-uncategoriz: Label for the Special:Ledger checkbox that keeps only entries with a blank category.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-assignee: Label for the assignee input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-assignee-pl: Placeholder text inside the assignee input.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-party: Label for the payee/payer input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-party-place: Placeholder text inside the payee/payer input.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-notes: Label for the notes-substring input in the Special:Ledger filter row.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-notes-place: Placeholder text inside the notes input.
receiptscanner-ledger-apply-filters: Label for the submit button on the Special:Ledger filter form.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-date: Special:Ledger results column header: entry date.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-type: Special:Ledger results column header: Expense or Income.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-party: Special:Ledger results column header: payee or payer.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-amount: Special:Ledger results column header: monetary total in the system currency.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-assignee: Special:Ledger results column header: assignee user.
receiptscanner-ledger-col-link: Special:Ledger results column header for the per-row icon link to the entry page.
receiptscanner-ledger-select-all: Hover title on the select-all checkbox at the top of the Special:Ledger results table.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-line: Single-line totals header above the results table on Special:Ledger. $1 = entry count, $2 = formatted expenses total, $3 = formatted income total, $4 = formatted net.
receiptscanner-ledger-view-summary: Label for the button that switches to the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-export-csv: Label for the Export CSV button (shown on both detail and summary views).
receiptscanner-ledger-back-to-detail: Label for the button that returns from summary view to the detail (filter+table) view.
receiptscanner-ledger-print: Label for the Print button on summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-no-results: Italic placeholder shown when no entries match the current filter set on Special:Ledger.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-heading: Heading at the top of the printable summary view (Schedule-C style P&L).
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-income: Section heading for income on the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-expenses: Section heading for expenses on the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-none: Placeholder when an Income / Expense section on the summary view has no entries.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-total-inco: Total row label for the income section on the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-total-expe: Total row label for the expenses section on the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-summary-net-income: Label for the net-income row at the bottom of the printable summary view.
receiptscanner-ledger-row-expense: Type column value for an expense row.
receiptscanner-ledger-row-income: Type column value for an income row.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-by-category: Heading on the collapsible By-category rollup table.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-by-month: Heading on the collapsible By-month rollup table.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-categor: Rollup table column header: category name (for the By-category table).
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-month: Rollup table column header: month (for the By-month table).
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-expense: Rollup table column header: total expenses for the row.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-income: Rollup table column header: total income for the row.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-net: Rollup table column header: net (income − expenses) for the row.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-col-count: Rollup table column header: count of entries for the row.
receiptscanner-ledger-rollup-uncategoriz: Placeholder shown in a category / month rollup cell when the source row has no category or no date.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-by-party-to: Tooltip on a payee/payer cell link in the Special:Ledger results table. $1 is the payee/payer name; clicking filters the ledger to that party.
receiptscanner-ledger-filter-by-category: Tooltip on a category cell link in the Special:Ledger results table. $1 is the category path; clicking filters the ledger to that category prefix.
receiptscanner-ledger-amount-original-to: Tooltip text on Special:Ledger amount cells whose receipt was in a non-system currency. $1 is the formatted original-currency amount.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-field-label: Label for the field-name dropdown on the Special:Ledger bulk-edit form.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-value-label: Label for the new-value input on the Special:Ledger bulk-edit form.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-apply: Label for the submit button on the Special:Ledger bulk-edit form.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-flash-main: Main bulk-edit success banner. $1 = the field name that was edited (e.g. category), $2 = count of updated entries.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-flash-skipped: Bulk-edit success banner suffix when some rows already had the target value. $1 = skipped count.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-flash-errors: Bulk-edit success banner suffix when some rows errored during update. $1 = error count.
receiptscanner-ledger-bulk-edit-summary: Edit summary recorded on each Cargo-stored page touched by a bulk-edit. Shown in content language.
receiptscanner-bulk-error-not-found: Per-page error line in the bulk-edit error list under the Special:Ledger flash banner, when a selected page does not exist. $1 is the page name. Shown in content language.
receiptscanner-bulk-error-wrong-namespac: Per-page error line in the bulk-edit error list under the Special:Ledger flash banner, when a selected page is not in the Expense or Income namespace. $1 is the page name. Shown in content language.
receiptscanner-bulk-error-not-wikitext: Per-page error line in the bulk-edit error list under the Special:Ledger flash banner, when a selected page has no wikitext content. $1 is the page name. Shown in content language.
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-type: CSV column header: Expense or Income.
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-party: CSV column header: payee or payer.
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-total: CSV column header: total in the system currency. $1 is the currency code.
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-original-total: CSV column header: receipt's original-currency amount (only meaningful when the row's currency differs from the system currency).
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-original-curre: CSV column header: the original-currency code on the receipt.
receiptscanner-ledger-csv-entry: CSV column header: the wiki page title of the entry.
receiptscanner-dashboard-upload-label: Top-line label on the Upload receipt dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-upload-sub: Subtitle on the Upload receipt dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-new-expense-lab: Top-line label on the manual-expense-entry dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-new-expense-sub: Subtitle on the manual-expense-entry dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-new-income-labe: Top-line label on the manual-income-entry dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-new-income-sub: Subtitle on the manual-income-entry dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-review-label: Top-line label on the Special:ReceiptReview dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-review-sub: Subtitle on the Special:ReceiptReview dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-ledger-label: Top-line label on the Special:Ledger dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-ledger-sub: Subtitle on the Special:Ledger dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-unlinked-label: Top-line label on the Special:UnlinkedFiles dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-dashboard-unlinked-sub: Subtitle on the Special:UnlinkedFiles dashboard tile.
receiptscanner-template-label-payee: Row label on the rendered Expense page for the payee (who received the money).
receiptscanner-template-label-payer: Row label on the rendered Income page for the payer (who sent the money).
receiptscanner-template-label-date: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: the entry's date.
receiptscanner-template-label-subtotal: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: pre-tax subtotal.
receiptscanner-template-label-tax: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: tax portion of the receipt.
receiptscanner-template-label-fees: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: fees portion of the receipt.
receiptscanner-template-label-payment-me: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: how the money was sent (Visa, ACH, etc.).
receiptscanner-template-label-category-e: Row label on a rendered Expense page: the accounting category path. Kind-specific to distinguish it from MediaWiki's page categories.
receiptscanner-template-label-category-i: Row label on a rendered Income page: the accounting category path. Kind-specific to distinguish it from MediaWiki's page categories.
receiptscanner-template-label-assignee: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: the user this entry is assigned to.
receiptscanner-template-label-notes: Row label on a rendered Expense / Income page: free-form notes.
receiptscanner-template-no-receipt: Placeholder rendered in the receipt-thumbnail slot when an Expense / Income entry has no attached file.
receiptscanner-template-company-wide: Pill shown in the Assignee field when no specific user is assigned (the entry is shared / company-wide).
receiptscanner-template-supporting-docum: Heading above the strip of supplementary file thumbnails on a rendered Expense / Income page.
receiptscanner-form-total-mismatch: Inline warning shown on the form when Total ≠ Subtotal + Tax + Fees. $1 is the entered total, $2 is the computed sum, both formatted to 2 decimals.
receiptscanner-upload-files-selected: Chosen-files counter shown next to the file picker on Special:UploadReceipt. $1 is the file count.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-type: Label prefix on the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the kind value (Expense / Income).
receiptscanner-parsed-label-date: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the receipt date.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-total: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the receipt total amount.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-subtotal: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the receipt subtotal amount.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-tax: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the receipt tax amount.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-fees: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the receipt fees amount.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-payee: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready expense row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the payee (vendor) name.
receiptscanner-parsed-label-payer: Label prefix in the parsed-fields list of a Ready income row in Special:ReceiptReview, before the payer (customer) name.
receiptscanner-form-clone-link: Text of the Clone link injected next to the file field on Form:Expense / Form:Income when editing an existing entry. Clicking it goes through Special:CloneReceiptEntry, which redirects to a fresh FormEdit with all fields (except queue_id) pre-populated so the user can save a sibling entry sharing the same receipt. Used for receipts that cover multiple line items.
receiptscanner-clone-no-source: Error body shown by Special:CloneReceiptEntry when accessed without a source page in the subpage slot.
receiptscanner-clone-source-not-found: Error body shown by Special:CloneReceiptEntry when the requested source page does not exist.
receiptscanner-clone-not-receipt: Error body shown by Special:CloneReceiptEntry when the requested source page is not in the Expense or Income namespace.
receiptscanner-clone-not-wikitext: Error body shown by Special:CloneReceiptEntry when the source page is not wikitext (e.g. a redirect or non-text content model).
receiptscanner-error-file-gone: User-facing label shown in the Action/Error column of a Failed row on Special:ReceiptReview when the underlying File: was deleted between enqueue and processing.
receiptscanner-error-unreadable: User-facing label shown in the Action/Error column of a Failed row on Special:ReceiptReview when the job runner could not read the local file bytes the sidecar was supposed to receive.
receiptscanner-error-sidecar-unreachable: User-facing label shown in the Action/Error column of a Failed row on Special:ReceiptReview when the HTTP call to the receipt-scanner sidecar failed (network, timeout, non-2xx).
receiptscanner-error-sidecar-bad-respons: User-facing label shown in the Action/Error column of a Failed row on Special:ReceiptReview when the receipt-scanner sidecar responded but the JSON body was missing required fields.
receiptscanner-error-internal: User-facing label shown in the Action/Error column of a Failed row on Special:ReceiptReview when an unexpected exception was caught (the underlying message is in the server log, not shown to the user).
